title: salvia officinalis subvar. mariolensis
intro: Salvia officinalis subvar. mariolensis, also known as Sardinian sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia officinalis plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Salvia officinalis subvar. mariolensis include reducing inflammation and improving cognitive function, as well as supporting digestive health and relieving symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
